title: AMC Entertainment Q3 2023 Earnings Preview
text: AMC Entertainment Holdings was scheduled to report third-quarter 2023 results on November 8, 2023. The consensus estimate for Q3 loss per share had contracted significantly to 22 cents from 48 cents over the previous 30 days, compared to a loss of $2 per share in the prior-year quarter. Revenue estimates stood at $1,246 million, representing 28.7% year-over-year growth from $968.4 million previously reported. Strong movie releases including Barbie, Oppenheimer, and Mission Impossible contributed to attendance growth. The company also benefited from increased food and beverage revenues, thanks to varied offerings at concession stands and Dine-In theatres. Ongoing writer and actor strikes alongside macroeconomic uncertainties posed challenges. When earnings were actually reported, AMC exceeded expectations with revenues exceeding $1.4 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $194 million, representing the most successful third quarter in the company's 103-year history.
